description: Fly.io is a Platform as a Service (PaaS) that enables developers to deploy and run applications globally as hardware-virtualized containers called Fly Machines. Applications are deployed across 30+ data centers worldwide using Docker containers, with sub-second launch times and scale-to-zero capabilities. The platform provides compute, storage, and networking infrastructure with CLI-based deployment, private networking via WireGuard, and built-in TLS termination.
hostingDescription: Classified as PaaS: platform for developers to deploy applications globally on Fly.io's proprietary hardware across 30+ regions
pricingType: Usage-based pricing (pay-as-you-go for VMs, storage, bandwidth) with optional support plans starting at $29/month
